name: azerothjs-monorepo
description: AzerothJS framework monorepo — fine-grained reactivity, zero Virtual DOM, direct DOM updates

scripts.build: npm run build -w @azerothjs/reactivity && npm run build -w @azerothjs/component && npm run build -w @azerothjs/testing && npm run build -w @azerothjs/renderer && npm run build -w @azerothjs/server && npm run build -w @azerothjs/router && npm run build -w @azerothjs/store && npm run build -w @azerothjs/form && npm run build -w @azerothjs/compiler && npm run build -w @azerothjs/core && npm run build -w @azerothjs/devtools && npm run build -w @azerothjs/eslint-plugin && npm run build -w @azerothjs/language-service && npm run build -w @azerothjs/language-server && npm run build -w @azerothjs/typescript-plugin
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run lint:publish && npm test && npm run leak
